name: Hezbollah
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **HEZBOLLAH RADWAN COMMANDER MALEK BALLOUT KILLED IN BEIRUT SUBURBS STRIKE MAY 6 — FIRST ISRAELI STRIKE ON LEBANESE CAPITAL SINCE MID-APRIL CEASEFIRE; PM NETANYAHU PERSONALLY ANNOUNCED ORDERING IT. HEZBOLLAH HAS NOT RETALIATED.** 13 killed in southern/eastern Lebanon May 5-6; 12-village forced displacement orders (most north of Litani — outside occupation zones, in violation of April 16 ceasefire). Day 11/14 of Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger window (closes May 11) — ALL 13+ casualties Lebanese, ZERO Israeli civilian casualties inside Israel proper this cycle. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem still 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks. **The structural read:** Israel exploiting diplomatic-track-on-Iran moment to take out high-value Hezbollah targets with minimal blowback risk; Hezbollah's coordination-decay framework holds (Day 76-77 of Houthi quiet, weak retaliation in Lebanon). The IRGC's reduced ability to direct proxy operations is the same factor visible in Houthi non-action despite Iran's May 4 multi-axis kinetic restart. If trigger window closes May 11 without Israeli civilian casualty, asymmetry framework consolidates as structural intelligence — Hezbollah operationally degraded, NOT just paused.

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11)

historical_summaries.summary: 5 signals. Hezbollah launched strikes on Israel in response to Khamenei's killing | Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon in response | Nearly 1,000 dead in Lebanon from 2 weeks of fighting

29 signals. Israel killed Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem — commander of Hezbollah's southern front — in Beirut airstrike on April 1 | Israel struck Lebanon April 1, coinciding with Trump's primetime address | CLAIMED (Hezbollah): Fired cruise missile at Israeli warship at midnight April 6, 68 nautical miles off Lebanese coast
